variants: Wiktor Nowacki, a distinguished inventor, currently resides in Roseglade Station after his early life began at Fernwillow Estate. He is credited with authoring the Heliotrope Signal Lens, a significant advancement that has drawn attention within the engineering community. His innovative contributions were recognized when he received the Garnet Shard Token, an honor that signifies excellence in creative engineering. Wiktor is also a passionate member of the Verdant Drift Crafters, where he collaborates with fellow enthusiasts to explore new crafting techniques and ideas. His journey reflects a deep commitment to invention and craftsmanship, shaping his reputation in the field.
